1.content: Below are some stories to read / write. So, get to it! ^^
1.title: The start

11.content:
This story includes; Sweaty and Smelly Feet, foot growth, futa growth, and possible urethral play much much farther down.




You are a sciantist, who works alongside your faithful assistant! Who are they?


Female - Chelsea, 20 year old, size 9 us feet

Female - Amanda, 23 year old, size 12 us feet

Male - Jake, 20 year old, size 10 us feet

Male - Mark, 20 year old, size 14 us feet

Or more options...
11.title: Story 1; The Lab

info.description:
So how does this work?

Well, for one, Any fetish is allowed as long as the focus is feet! (Or footpaws if the character(s) are furry / anthro)
My only requests here, is;

At the very beginning of your story, to tag the fetishes included. Very simple, just use the first few sentences to let readers know what to expect c:

To always have a "More Stories" choice, so that we can build up a nice library of stories here.

Please, the more you write per section the better. Feel free to let loose, and have fun with these!

Do NOT include a fetish the previous chapter didn't mention, this way if you decide to add to someone's story, they can still enjoy it the same.
Or by the very least, type the fetishes being added at the very top.

No hate, racisms, etc. 2020 has given us enough of that to deal with. That said, there is a place for it in story writing, but not if your using this as some kind of propaganda tool.

Have fun, and tell others about this interactive ^^
